description: A research agent that searches and analyzes papers from arXiv. Specializes in computational and quantitative research including ML/AI for biology, bioinformatics, statistical methods, protein structure prediction, and biophysics.
name: arXiv Research Agent

skills.description:
Search arXiv for scientific papers matching a query.

This tool performs full-text search across arXiv papers including titles,
abstracts, and metadata. Ideal for finding computational, mathematical,
and quantitative research including ML/AI for biology, bioinformatics,
statistical methods, and biophysics.

Returns:
    Dictionary with status and content containing formatted paper results
    including titles, authors, abstracts, arXiv IDs, and PDF links.

Examples:
    Basic search:
        search_arxiv_tool("protein structure prediction")

    Search for recent ML papers in biology:
        search_arxiv_tool("deep learning drug discovery", sort_by="submittedDate")

    Search within a specific category:
        search_arxiv_tool("single cell", category="q-bio.GN")

    Author search:
        search_arxiv_tool("au:alphafold", sort_by="submittedDate")
skills.name: search_arxiv_tool

skills.description:
Retrieve full details for a specific arXiv paper by its ID.

Fetches complete metadata including title, all authors with affiliations,
full abstract, categories, publication dates, and links to PDF and DOI.

Returns:
    Dictionary with status and content containing the full paper details
    including abstract, author affiliations, and links.

Examples:
    Get a paper by ID:
        get_paper_tool("2401.12345")

    Get a specific version:
        get_paper_tool("2401.12345v2")
skills.name: get_paper_tool
